name: PHAB Telegram Bridge In
info:
Bridge node for existing Telegram bot flows.

Input: message from telegram receiver (msg.originalMessage preferred).
Action: normalize to Telegram webhook-like update and POST to NestJS webhook /api/integrations/telegram/webhook.

Subflow env vars:
- PHAB_API_BASE (default http://localhost:3000/api)
- PHAB_TG_WEBHOOK_SECRET (optional)

name: normalize + build webhook request
log non-2xx
